ITextScrollerItem
ICorTextScrollerProps
COR_TEXT_SCROLLER_DEFAULT
CorTextScrollerComponent
COR_TYPEWRITER_TRANSITIONS
data.content:
/**
 * How to transition between strings:
 *  'erase'   – backspace current string, then type next
 *  'clear'   – instantly wipe, then type next
 *  'append'  – keep previous text, append next on a new line
 *  'replace' – instant swap, no animation
 */
export const COR_TYPEWRITER_TRANSITIONS = [
  "erase",
  "clear",
  "append",
  "replace",
] as const;

data.name: TCorTypewriterTransitions
data.content:
export type TCorTypewriterTransitions =
  (typeof COR_TYPEWRITER_TRANSITIONS)[number];

data.name: ICorTypewriterProps
COR_TYPEWRITER_DEFAULT
data.content:
export const COR_TYPEWRITER_DEFAULT: ICorTypewriterProps = {
  bold: "normal",
  colorText: "base-900",
  delay: 0,
  eraseSpeed: 60, // chars per sec
  loop: true,
  pauseAfterErase: 400, // ms
  pauseAfterType: 1500, // ms
  sizeFont: "2xl",
  speed: 30, // chars per sec
  texts: [
    "I build with Angular signals.",
    "I type letter by letter.",
    "I loop through multiple strings.",
    "I am a typewriter.",
  ],
  tracking: "wide",
  transition: "erase",
};

data.name: CorTypewriterComponent
